text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Trainer! ☆ And congratulations
to me, too! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Are you wondering what we're celebrating? Just
think about it!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You could've gone anywhere, right? And there's a
chance I could've been somewhere else too!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: But at this very moment, you're right here talking to me! That's a miracle of astronomically tiny odds! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
This instant in time is simply marvelous! ☆ So
once again, congratulations, Trainer! And
congratulations, me!
